mapper.insert:
insert into order_detail ( name, image, order_id, dish_id, setmeal_id, dish_flavor, number, amount) VALUES
(#{o.name},#{o.image},#{o.orderId},#{o.dishId},#{o.setmealId},#{o.dishFlavor},#{o.number},#{o.amount})

insert into shopping_cart ( name, image, user_id, dish_id, setmeal_id, dish_flavor, number, amount, create_time) values (#{o.name},#{o.image},#{o.userId},#{o.dishId},#{o.setmealId},#{o.dishFlavor},#{o.number},#{o.amount},#{o.createTime})
mapper.update:
update orders
cancel_reason=#{cancelReason},
rejection_reason=#{rejectionReason},
cancel_time=#{cancelTime},
pay_status=#{payStatus},
pay_method=#{payMethod},
checkout_time=#{checkoutTime},
status = #{status},
delivery_time = #{deliveryTime}
where id = #{id}
update orders set status = 6,cancel_time =NOW() where id = #{id}
update orders set status = 3 where id = #{id}
update orders set status = 6 , rejection_reason = #{rejectionReason}, orders.cancel_time = NOW() where id = #{id}
update orders set status = 6,cancel_reason = #{cancelReason},orders.cancel_time = NOW() where id =#{id}
update orders set status = 4 where id = #{id}
update orders set status = 5 where id = #{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT -- 统计待接单数量，将结果列命名为 toBeConfirmed SUM(CASE WHEN status = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS toBeConfirmed,
-- 统计待派送数量，将结果列命名为 confirmed SUM(CASE WHEN status = 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS confirmed,
-- 统计派送中数量，将结果列命名为 deliveryInProgress SUM(CASE WHEN status = 4 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS deliveryInProgress FROM orders
